proposals.reasoning: The proposed false positives are short labels or descriptive text that were incorrectly identified as section headers by the parser. They should be treated as body text or sub-details. No new boilerplate was identified as there's no evidence of university-wide institutional text that appears verbatim across all syllabi. The text cleanups address explicit duplicates ('Credit Hours: 1 TO 23' and '### Grading Policy') and a formatting artifact ('- -') as noted in the issues found and observed in the document.
